replies.msg: 無

I used to work there as an engineer which I enjoyed. I like the culture there. The workers are very polite. The interior and exterior are exquisitely and artistically designed. There’s a Pacific coffee in the building where I always made it worth the barista’s while after having a coffee ☕️ It’s great to hear you got an offer. Have you assigned a time for your interview? I remember a day before my interview I assigned four hours for my preparation. I’m currently working at HSBC. Just the other day my farm in China was assigned to my older brother and my property in Seoul was assigned to my wife.
